title: Practical Item Textures
body:
## (You'll need Optifine or CITresewn!)

Ever feel like Minecraft’s items could use a bit more clear visuals? This texture pack brings the little details into focus with a complete visual overhaul for a variety of items!
If you've ever thought that small details can make a big difference, this texture pack is for you!


![all items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0538872de21294e3ed245c41ba17c65930d9577.png)
 

Features:
-Unique gray, lime, purple, magenta and pink dyes

dyes-Debugstick

-Dragon egg now styled to match the look of sniffer and turtle eggs

-Dragon breath

-Torchs

![Torchs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/057f5fcff1506c3fec2604011e313ae914871f88.png)

-Conduit and heavy core

-Amethyst buds remaster

![Amethyst](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f20479402597c89ed19c0bf38a744741dcdfc57.png)

-Easter egg NBT textures for nametags and spawn eggs

![NBTS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21036faa562e3316690f51f07142399fc13edaf5.png)

-Beacon texture remastered to look like end crystal

-Quiver and spectral quiver for 16 arrows

-Non water bottle looking mundane, awkward and thick potions

![Potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b48325023355fabdf152db548dae5e93d86371d7.png)

-Unique powder/dusts textures (sugar, gunpowder, glowstone and redstone)

![Powder and dust](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0ec41362ec4a1cfd33a975f7613f5b530de1002.png)

-Coherent exp bottle

-Coherent iron nugget

-Enchanted Golden Apple Exclusive Texture

-Gem glint for lapis lazuli

-Color consistent lead

-Hot lava and cold snow buckets

-Glittering melon slice

-Carpets, beds and shulkers

![Colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12bdd428060794c48048d6c9a6d37fe49b9fde8b.png)

-Custom apple colors CIT

-Forced Banner Patterns Texture Variants if you are under 1.21.2 version
